channel.title: Tesla on Lucky Taorem | Tech & AI Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Tesla on Lucky Taorem | Tech & AI Blog

item.title: Tesla's Autonomous Vehicles
item.description: New Jersey lawmakers consider banning Tesla's autonomous vehicles over safety concerns

item.title: Tesla Autopilot Crash in Texas: Autonomy, Safety, and Legal Fallout
item.description: A Tesla Model 3 with Autopilot engaged crashed into a Texas home, killing a woman. Authorities confirm the driver was using automated driving assistance. The incident raises questions about AV safety and Tesla's regulatory compliance.

item.title: Tesla Autopilot Crash
item.description: Tesla Autopilot feature under investigation after fatal crash
